name: saperly
description: Phone carrier for AI agents. Provision phone numbers, place and receive calls, manage TCPA compliance and consent, track usage and billing.

groups.name: calls
groups.description: Place outbound calls, retrieve call history, manage hosted-mode AI calls

groups.name: compliance
groups.description: Immutable audit trail for disclosures, consent, call lifecycle

groups.name: disclosures
groups.description: Custom TCPA disclosure messages played at call start

groups.name: billing
groups.description: Account balance in USD, transaction history (postpaid — auto-charges saved card)

groups.name: keys
groups.description: Manage child API keys minted from a service key

tools.name: saperly_create_line
tools.description: provision a new phone line for your ai agent. returns the assigned phone number. mode: webhook (S2T+T2S via your HTTP webhook, bring your own AI), audio (raw websocket stream), or hosted (saperly runs the AI, requires systemPrompt).

tools.name: saperly_list_lines
tools.description: list all phone lines on your account with their phone numbers and mode.

tools.name: saperly_get_line
tools.description: get details for a specific phone line.

tools.name: saperly_update_line
tools.description: update a phone line's configuration. can change webhook urls, system prompt, voice, recording, and other settings.

tools.name: saperly_create_call
tools.description: make an outbound phone call from one of your lines. consent must be granted first (use saperly_grant_consent). billed per-second at the line's voice rate.

tools.name: saperly_list_calls
tools.description: list recent calls. optionally filter by line or status.

tools.name: saperly_get_call
tools.description: get details for a specific call.

tools.name: saperly_hangup_call
tools.description: terminate an active call. irreversible.

tools.name: saperly_conversation_call
tools.description: make an AI phone call. saperly runs the LLM with your instructions. returns the full transcript when the call ends. no webhook or backend needed.

tools.name: saperly_grant_consent
tools.description: record outbound consent for a phone number. required before making outbound calls to that number.

tools.name: saperly_check_consent
tools.description: check if consent exists for a phone number on a line.

tools.name: saperly_revoke_consent
tools.description: revoke consent for a phone number. future outbound calls to this number will be blocked.

tools.name: saperly_compliance_audit
tools.description: query the immutable compliance audit trail. shows disclosure plays, consent events, call lifecycle events.

tools.name: saperly_create_disclosure
tools.description: create a custom tcpa disclosure message played at the start of every call on lines using this disclosure.

tools.name: saperly_list_disclosures
tools.description: list all tcpa disclosure configurations.

tools.name: saperly_get_balance
tools.description: check your account balance in USD. calls cost $0.13/min webhook mode or $0.26/min hosted mode for Zone A (US/Canada). international destinations use Zone B (×2) or Zone C (×3) multipliers. phone numbers cost $2.50/month (first number free for 30 days). billed per second; balance never expires.

tools.name: saperly_add_funds
tools.description: DEPRECATED — do not call. Manual top-up was removed in v0.5.2.0. Saperly is now postpaid: when balance runs low, your saved card on file is auto-charged. To add or update a payment method, direct the user to https://app.saperly.com/billing.

tools.name: saperly_list_transactions
tools.description: list recent billing transactions: charges, refunds, signup credit, auto-recharges. shows amount in USD, type, and running balance.

tools.name: saperly_account_overview
tools.description: get a full snapshot of your saperly account: all lines, balance, usage, and 5 most recent calls. use this first to understand current state.

tools.name: saperly_webhook_deliveries
tools.description: list recent webhook delivery attempts. shows status, duration, errors for each delivery.

tools.name: saperly_webhook_stats
tools.description: get aggregate webhook delivery statistics.

tools.name: saperly_webhook_test
tools.description: send a test webhook to a line's configured URL.

tools.name: saperly_send_sms
tools.description: send an outbound SMS. requires either an inbound SMS from the recipient within the last 24 hours, OR active explicit_outbound consent on file for that (line, recipient) pair (e.g. recorded via POST /v1/consent or a web-form opt-in).

tools.name: saperly_list_conversations
tools.description: list SMS conversations grouped by contact. shows most recent message and count.

tools.name: saperly_get_conversation
tools.description: get full SMS message history for a conversation with a specific contact.

tools.name: saperly_get_usage
tools.description: get usage statistics. shows calls, minutes, SMS counts, and costs by day or month.

tools.name: saperly_get_settings
tools.description: get your account settings. currently shows default webhook URL.

tools.name: saperly_update_settings
tools.description: update account settings. set or clear the default webhook URL used for new lines.

tools.name: saperly_list_voices
tools.description: list available TTS voices for hosted-mode calls. use the voice id when creating or updating a line.

tools.name: saperly_audit_list
tools.description: list recent activity stamped to your api key (calls, sms, compliance events, billing transactions). agent-self audit feed; default scope is the caller's own key. time-sorted DESC, max 500 events per call.

tools.name: saperly_key_create
tools.description: mint a new child api key. requires service-key auth. returns plaintext ONCE.

tools.name: saperly_key_list
tools.description: list child api keys minted by the service key. metadata only.

tools.name: saperly_key_get
tools.description: retrieve a single child api key by id. metadata only.

tools.name: saperly_key_update
tools.description: update label, scope, permissions, or cap on a child api key.

tools.name: saperly_key_delete
tools.description: soft-revoke a child api key. DESTRUCTIVE. requires confirm=true.

tools.name: saperly_key_rotate
tools.description: atomic rotate: revoke old + mint new. returns new plaintext ONCE. DESTRUCTIVE.
